name: Grade 3 Team Sports — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 3 pathway for building organized skills, vocabulary, and short research products through Team Sports. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 3 knowledge and transferable skills in building organized skills, vocabulary, and short research products through Team Sports.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.
